text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 104 

HRR_ADJSTMT_AMT 

LABEL: Hospital Readmission Reduction (HRR) Adjustment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount field (rounded to whole dollars) that represents the Hospital Readmission Reduction (HRR) 
Program amount. This is a reduction to the claim for readmissions. This field holds a negative amount. 

SHORT NAME: HRR_ADJSTMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: HRR_ADJSTMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH
